package rulecoverage

func NegativeRepositoryBeginsTransactionWithoutUowOrCallback() string {
    ruleID := "repository_begins_transaction_without_uow_or_callback"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repositories that quietly start transactions inside generic CRUD methods."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
